infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Math Talk uses the microphone so you can speak your answers.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Math Talk uses speech recognition to understand your spoken math answers.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Math Talk to use the microphone so you can speak your answers in class and games.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Math Talk to hear your spoken numbers during lessons and games.
